mapper.sql: id, bill_month, cust_name, code, receive_count, avg_weight, receivable_amount, special_remark, adjust_amount, transfer_type, actual_amount, transfer_date, remark, verify_sign, type, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT w.send_customer_name AS custName, w.send_customer AS code, COUNT(*) AS receiveCount, AVG(w.weight) AS avgWeight, SUM(w.express_fee) AS receivableAmount, '直营客户' AS custType FROM t_waybill_detail w WHERE (w.emp_type IS NULL OR w.emp_type = '') AND w.send_customer_name IS NOT NULL GROUP BY w.send_customer_name, w.send_customer

SELECT c.contract_name AS custName, '' AS code, COUNT(*) AS receiveCount, AVG(w.weight) AS avgWeight, SUM(w.express_fee) AS receivableAmount, '直营业务员' AS custType FROM t_contract_staff c INNER JOIN t_waybill_detail w ON c.real_name = w.salesman_name WHERE w.emp_type IS NOT NULL AND w.emp_type != '' AND c.staff_type = 1 GROUP BY c.contract_name

SELECT c.contract_name AS custName, '' AS code, COUNT(*) AS receiveCount, AVG(w.weight) AS avgWeight, SUM(w.express_fee) AS receivableAmount, w.emp_type AS custType FROM t_contract_staff c INNER JOIN t_waybill_detail w ON c.real_name = w.salesman_name WHERE w.emp_type = '散件' AND c.staff_type = 0 GROUP BY c.contract_name,w.emp_type

SELECT c.emp_name AS custName, '' AS code, COUNT(*) AS receiveCount, AVG(w.weight) AS avgWeight, SUM(w.express_fee) AS receivableAmount, w.emp_type AS custType FROM t_shop_emp c INNER JOIN t_waybill_detail w ON c.shop_name = w.settle_name WHERE w.emp_type IN ('淘宝', '限定') AND c.platform = w.material_type GROUP BY c.emp_name, w.emp_type

SELECT t1.emp_name AS empName, t1.cust_name AS custName, COUNT(*) AS receiveCount, AVG(t2.weight) AS avgWeight, SUM(t2.express_fee) AS receivableAmount, '特批' AS custType FROM t_shop_emp t1 INNER JOIN t_waybill_detail t2 ON t1.shop_name = t2.settle_name WHERE t2.emp_type = '特批' GROUP BY t1.emp_name,t1.cust_name
